falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and invalidate the pattern's bearish implications

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 15 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would refute the 'blowoff' scenario (which requires heightened volatility) and suggest a different market phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sudden dovish pivot would directly contradict the pattern's implied economic environment and invalidate the current call

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
